name: write
title: write
description: Outputs a text message to the Write Window. Write is based on the C function printf.
The compiler cannot check the format string. Illegal format entries will lead to undefined results. Messages output with the write function will be displayed on separate lines.

parameters.name: "%g","%f"
parameters.description: floating point display e.g. %5.3f means, 5 digits in total (decimal point inclusive) and 3 digits after the decimal point. 5 is the minimum of digits in this case.

parameters.name: "%I64d","%lld"
parameters.description: decimal display of a 64 bit value

parameters.name: "%I64x","%llx
parameters.description: hexadecimal display of a 64 bit value

parameters.name: "%I64X","%llX"
parameters.description: hexadecimal display of a 64 bit value (upper case)

parameters.name: "%I64u","%llu"
parameters.description: unsigned display of a 64 bit value

parameters.name: "%I64o","%llo"
parameters.description: octal display of a 64 bit value
